question: Which object is located in the upper-left corner of the image? Select from the following options: (A) The man standing on the dock. (B) The boat with a red flag on the front. (C) The tall building in the distance. (D) The group of boats docked in the water.
gold_answer: The tall building in the distance
answer_choices: The man standing on the dock
